Proposal A suggests 35 ZUP, which is a reasonable starting point and leaves room for negotiation, aiming for a profit of 5 ZUP.
Proposal B suggests 45 ZUP, which is a higher initial offer, aiming for a profit of 5 ZUP.

My initial proposal was 30 ZUP, aiming for a profit of 10 ZUP. While I initially thought 10 ZUP was acceptable, seeing the other proposals, I realize aiming higher is better. I will adopt Proposal B.
